name: Slash Untitled
about:
SLASH UNTITLED is a multidisciplinary creative practice based between Paris and Zurich, founded by Mauro Cecchetti. Operating at the intersection of architecture, visual culture, and contemporary art, the
studio develops concept-driven work across spatial design, exhibitions, and visual direction.
Structured as a flexible platform, slash untitled collaborates with a network of creatives on a project-by-project basis, allowing each commission to be approached with a precise and adaptive
methodology.
